parameters.jsCode:
const all = $input.item.json.allCasesList || [];
return all.map(c => ({ json: c }));

const failed = $input.item.json.failedCasesList || [];
return failed.map(c => ({ json: c }));

parameters.subject: ={{ '🚨 Failed: ' + $json.testTitle }}
parameters.message:
={{ "

❌ Failure Detected

" + $json.testTitle + "

Workflow File: " + $json.filename + "

System Logs

" + $json.error + "

Execution Context Screenshot:

" }}
